Ltd., an independent third-party business research/corporate intelligence platform in India — similar to a generic company registry lookup site — with no ownership or affiliation to RHI Magnesita India Ltd; the URLs merely reference RHI Magnesita as a searched entity on this public platform.
ams-OSRAM AG|||careers: The domain careers.ams-osram.com is an official subdomain of ams-osram.com, serving as the careers/recruitment portal for ams-OSRAM AG, clearly belonging to the company.
